title: AAM/UAM network-defined operational concept
description: The AAM/UAM mission is defined by the network not the vehicle alone — vertiport pairs + airspace corridors + charging infrastructure + UTM integration constitute the certified system

title: U-space corridor operations definition
description: Operations confined to U-space corridor at 150–300 m AGL requiring U-space service provider (USSP) integration and UTM data exchange
notes: Cruise altitude band per U-space regulation

title: Vertiport infrastructure pair requirement
description: Each mission requires a certified vertiport origin (A) and destination (B) with FATO pad ≥ 1.5D (D = 10 × outer rotor envelope) and ground charging infrastructure
